subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, Jinab-i-Siyyid Abu-Talib! Praise be unto God that ever His hosts are triumphant, that is, over the legions of desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله جناب سید ابوطالب الحمد لله تا بود جند غالب بود یعنی بجنود هوی در
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @firmness in the Covenant
